/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/usr/local/opt/openssl@3/lib CMakeFiles/demo_r1cs_ppzkadsnark.dir/zk_proof_systems/ppzkadsnark/r1cs_ppzkadsnark/examples/demo_r1cs_ppzkadsnark.cpp.o -o demo_r1cs_ppzkadsnark  libsnark_adsnark.a libsnark.a ../depends/libff/libff/libff.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libgmp.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libgmp.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libgmpxx.dylib ../depends/libzm.a ../depends/libsnark_supercop.a -lcrypto
